articles.title: UK MPs reject Australia-like social media ban for under-16s, seek flexible powers – details here
articles.description: UK MPs rejected a proposed ban on social media for under-16s, despite the House of Lords’ earlier support. Conservatives called it an “emergency,” while critics warned a total ban could push teens online unsafely. The government will explore flexible rules and age-based restrictions instead.

articles.title: Family of child injured in Canada school shooting sues OpenAI
articles.description: The family alleges the firm knew the perpetrator was planning a "mass casualty event" but failed to contact the authorities.
